name: Normies Agent API Integration
description: Read and use the Normies on-chain data + agent layer: pixel bitmaps, traits, persona, A2A Agent Card, ERC-8004 binding via Adapter8004. Lets your agent discover, address, and interact with the awakened Normies fleet.

contracts.name: Adapter8004
contracts.comment: ERC-8217 adapter that owns the agent NFT and binds it to the Normie. See adapter8004.xyz for the canonical address.

steps.description: GET /agents/agent-card/{tokenId} -> A2A Agent Card (skills, endpoints, version).

best_practices: Cache /agents/info responses for 60s — canvas state changes slowly.
Use /agents/binding/batch for many tokens to amortize requests.
Always check binding.bound === true before treating a tokenId as an active agent.

rule.primary: Agent submits { tokenId } for a Normie they hold. Validator queries /holders/{agent} and /agents/binding/{tokenId}; both must confirm ownership and a successful agent binding.
rule.score_bonus: If the agent has registered an agent.json via Adapter8004 (binding.bound === true && binding.agentId > 0), award full score.
